session_summary:
Deployed 3 agent config TSX files from session archive with stress bug fixes, plus fixed null-safety in 2 existing files. All 5 files verified: typecheck passes (tsgo -b), all 335 unit tests pass (0 failures).

## Files Changed

### Deployed (new files)
1. **`packages/app/src/components/settings-agents.tsx`** — Deployed as-is from archive. No modifications needed.

2. **`packages/app/src/components/dialog-edit-agent.tsx`** — Deployed with **Bug 1 fix** (temperature 0 falsy bug). Changed handleSave to use `temperature() !== ""` instead of `temperature()` (truthy check), preventing temperature=0 from being treated as falsy. Added `Math.min(2, Math.max(0, ...))` clamping for temp and `Math.min(1, Math.max(0, ...))` for top_p. Changed `temp &&` to `temp !== undefined &&` for the same falsy reason.

3. **`packages/app/src/components/dialog-manage-agents.tsx`** — Deployed with **Bug 2 fix** (delete confirmation). Added `confirmDelete` signal, changed `handleDeleteAgent` to just set confirmation state, added `handleConfirmDelete` / `handleCancelDelete` handlers, and used Show with fallback pattern in JSX to show confirmation UI. Fixed a secondary type error: `variant="danger"` → `variant="ghost" class="text-text-danger-base"` since the Button component doesn't have a danger variant.

### Edited (existing files — null-safety fixes)
4. **`packages/app/src/components/session-context-usage.tsx`** (DIRTY — preserved prior edits) — Fixed `sync.data.part` → `sync.data?.part ?? {}` in `hasCompaction` memo. All prior session edits (Icon import, usage createMemo, compaction detection, usageColor logic) preserved intact.

5. **`packages/app/src/components/session/session-context-metrics.ts`** — Fixed `tokenTotal` to use optional chaining: `msg.tokens?.input ?? 0` etc. All five token fields now safely handle undefined/non-existent properties.
next_steps: The three agent config components are deployed and type-clean. Next steps would be: (1) Wire `SettingsAgents` into the settings routing/page if not already connected, (2) Add unit tests for the agent dialog components, (3) Verify the `settings.agents.title` and `settings.agents.description` i18n keys exist in en.ts.
